positive: A highly stylized, maximalist celestial forest scene, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The main subject is a collection of abstract, glowing flora and fauna intertwined with swirling cosmic nebulae and geometric celestial bodies. Use silhouettes of stylized mystical creatures (e.g., flying manta rays, glowing deer, crystalline trees) against a deep, twilight indigo and vibrant emerald green sky. The lighting should be dramatic, emanating from the glowing flora and nebulae, creating strong internal backlighting and high contrast. The composition must be centrally balanced and suitable for repeating textile patterns. Hyper-detailed, clean vector art aesthetic mixed with ethereal watercolor elements. Studio shot quality, smooth gradients, no discernible brushstrokes.
